name: Coconut Mango Thai Beef Curry
intro: Experience a delightful combination of sweet and spicy flavors with this recipe. The tropical essence of mango and coconut milk brings a burst of freshness, while the curry paste adds a fiery kick. This dish is perfect for infusing traditional recipes with an exciting flavor profile. If you prefer a milder taste, simply reduce the amount of curry paste for a lighter variation. Get ready to elevate your culinary creations with this exquisite blend of sweet and spicy goodness.

ingredients.item: Cubed boneless beef chuck roast - 2 ½ pounds

method: Heat the peanut oil over the low heat, then stir-fry the curry paste in a Dutch oven, for 3-5 mins.
Add coconut milk into the Dutch oven and let it cook (stirring) for 3-5 minutes.

Add mango, beef, pepper, and salt into the Dutch oven. Increase heat to medium-high and let it boil. When it starts boiling, reduce heat and let it simmer (covered) for about 2 hours, stirring occasionally. When done, you may serve it with rice, onions, cilantro and/or lime wedges.
